<p dir="auto">TradingView Lightweight Charts are one of the smallest and fastest financial HTML5 charts.</p>
<p dir="auto">The Lightweight Charting Library is the best choice for you if you want to display financial data as an interactive chart on your web page without affecting your web page loading speed and performance.</p>
<p dir="auto">It is the best choice for you if you want to replace static image charts with interactive ones.
The size of the library is close to static images but if you have dozens of image charts on a web page then using this library can make the size of your web page smaller.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">About</h2><a id="user-content-about" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: About" href="#about"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Known Bugs</h2><a id="user-content-known-bugs" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Known Bugs" href="#known-bugs"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>If trying to use some tools in a blank area to the left of the first data point, it might not show</li>
<li>Some line tools options do nothing "angle, scale, cap, join"</li>
<li>The Circle tool, if the 2nd point is to the left of the 1st point, and you pan the screen to the right so the 1st point goes off the screen, then the circle will disappear. Just put the 2nd point to the right of the 1st point to prevent.</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a name="user-content-how-to-build"></a>How to Build</h2><a id="user-content-how-to-build" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How to Build" href="#how-to-build"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Clone the project</li>
<li>have node installed, you can google it</li>
<li>cd into the clones project directory</li>
<li><code>npm install --force</code></li>
<li><code>npm run build:prod</code></li>
<li>now you can view the debug.html in the root folder to view how the lineTools works</li>
<li>built files are located in /dist</li>
</ol>
<hr>

<p dir="auto">What I use in react</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-en">useEffect</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>

  <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">chartReady</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-smi">console</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"inside useEffect for crosshair SyncHandler"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>

    <span class="pl-c">//used to store the previous xx time if the timeToCoord return null, then the crosshair would disapear</span>
    <span class="pl-c">//so ill use this var to just display the previous candle vs it disapearring constantly</span>
    <span class="pl-c">//TODO, this will only update when a new time interval from chart 1 is hit, so it techncicly</span>
    <span class="pl-c">//shows the incorrect  time if time is between the 2 chart intervals</span>
    <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">crosshairPreviousXX</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>

    <span class="pl-c">//const crosshairSyncHandler = (param, seriesMaster, seriesSlave, fromChartNumber, chartToModify) => {</span>
    <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-en">crosshairSyncHandler</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">fromChartNumber</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-smi">console</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"syncing crosshairs master is chart "</span> <span class="pl-c1">+</span> <span class="pl-s1">fromChartNumber</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
      <span class="pl-smi">console</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>

      <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">fromChartNumber</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">1</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">chartToModify</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart2</span>
        <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">seriesMaster</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">candleSeriesRef</span>
        <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">seriesSlave</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">candleSeries2Ref</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>

      <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">fromChartNumber</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">2</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        
        <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">chartToModify</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart</span>
        <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">seriesMaster</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">candleSeries2Ref</span>
        <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">seriesSlave</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">candleSeriesRef</span>
        
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>        

      <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">time</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">undefined</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>

        <span class="pl-c">//time axis</span>
        <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">xx</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">chartToModify</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">timeScale</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">timeToCoordinate</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">time</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
        <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">price</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">seriesMaster</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">coordinateToPrice</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">point</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">y</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
        <span class="pl-c">//price axis</span>
        <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">yy</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">seriesSlave</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">priceToCoordinate</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">price</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
        <span class="pl-c">//console.log("x cord = " + xx)</span>
        <span class="pl-c">//console.log("y cord = " + yy)</span>
        <span class="pl-c">//everything is good, so update the crosshair</span>
        <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">xx</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//console.log("both axis")</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//console.log("x = " + xx)</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//console.log("y = " + yy)</span>
          <span class="pl-s1">chartToModify</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">setCrossHairXY</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">xx</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span><span class="pl-s1">yy</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span><span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//set previous because xx is a lefit time</span>
          <span class="pl-s1">crosshairPreviousXX</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">xx</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
        <span class="pl-k">else</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//console.log("else")</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//console.log("x = " + xx)</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//console.log("y = " + yy)</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//if xx is null than it did not respond with a time, so use crosshairPreviousXX so it displays something</span>
          <span class="pl-s1">chartToModify</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">setCrossHairXY</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">crosshairPreviousXX</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span><span class="pl-s1">yy</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span><span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      
      <span class="pl-c">//time is undefined</span>
      <span class="pl-k">else</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-c">//point.y exists</span>
        <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">point</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">undefined</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//console.log("param.point.y = " + param.point.y )</span>
          <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">price</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">seriesMaster</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">coordinateToPrice</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">point</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">y</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//price axis</span>
          <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">yy</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">seriesSlave</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">priceToCoordinate</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">price</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span> 
          <span class="pl-c">//only show the price axis</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//console.log("x = " + xx)</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//console.log("y = " + yy)</span>
          <span class="pl-s1">chartToModify</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">setCrossHairXY</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-c1">null</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span><span class="pl-s1">yy</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span><span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span> 
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>

        <span class="pl-c">//no axis points exist, most likely cursor is in Y price scale axis</span>
        <span class="pl-c">//point.y does not exist</span>
        <span class="pl-k">else</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-c">//clar the slave chart crosshair</span>
          <span class="pl-s1">chartToModify</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">clearCrossHair</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    
    
    <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-en">chart1CrosshairSyncHandler</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-en">crosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">1</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    
    <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-en">chart2CrosshairSyncHandler</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-en">crosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">param</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">2</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>         

  
    <span class="pl-c">//chart 2 exists and sync crosshairs is enabled</span>
    <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">chartReady</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span> <span class="pl-c1">&&</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart2Ready</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span> <span class="pl-c1">&&</span> <span class="pl-s1">syncCrosshairsDisabled</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">false</span> <span class="pl-c1">&&</span> <span class="pl-s1">syncCrosshairsSelected</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-smi">console</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"inside sync crosshairs"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
  
      <span class="pl-c">//chart 1 active</span>
      <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">pointerOverChart</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">1</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">chart2</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span> <span class="pl-c1">&&</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart2ContainerRef</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s1">chart2</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unsubscribeCrosshairMove</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-en">chart2CrosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
        
        <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">subscribeCrosshairMove</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-en">chart1CrosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>

      <span class="pl-c">//chart 2 active</span>
      <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">pointerOverChart</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">2</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unsubscribeCrosshairMove</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-en">chart1CrosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
        <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">chart2</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span> <span class="pl-c1">&&</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart2ContainerRef</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s1">chart2</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">subscribeCrosshairMove</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-en">chart2CrosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>   
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>      

      <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unsubscribeCrosshairMove</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-en">chart1CrosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
        <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">chart2</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span> <span class="pl-c1">&&</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart2ContainerRef</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
          <span class="pl-s1">chart2</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unsubscribeCrosshairMove</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-en">chart2CrosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
        
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>

    <span class="pl-c">//crosshair sync is not active, so unsubscribe to both events</span>
    <span class="pl-k">else</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unsubscribeCrosshairMove</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-en">chart1CrosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>

      <span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">chart2Ready</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span> <span class="pl-c1">&&</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart2</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span> <span class="pl-c1">&&</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart2ContainerRef</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">chart2</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unsubscribeCrosshairMove</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-en">chart2CrosshairSyncHandler</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>

<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">[</span><span class="pl-s1">chartReady</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">chart2Ready</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">syncCrosshairsDisabled</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">syncCrosshairsSelected</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">pointerOverChart</span><span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="useEffect(() => {

  if(chartReady === true){
    console.log("inside useEffect for crosshair SyncHandler")

    //used to store the previous xx time if the timeToCoord return null, then the crosshair would disapear
    //so ill use this var to just display the previous candle vs it disapearring constantly
    //TODO, this will only update when a new time interval from chart 1 is hit, so it techncicly
    //shows the incorrect  time if time is between the 2 chart intervals
    var crosshairPreviousXX = 0

    //const crosshairSyncHandler = (param, seriesMaster, seriesSlave, fromChartNumber, chartToModify) => {
    const crosshairSyncHandler = (param, fromChartNumber) => {
      console.log("syncing crosshairs master is chart " + fromChartNumber)
      console.log(param)

      if(fromChartNumber === 1){
        var chartToModify = chart2
        var seriesMaster = candleSeriesRef
        var seriesSlave = candleSeries2Ref
      }

      else if(fromChartNumber === 2) {
        
        var chartToModify = chart
        var seriesMaster = candleSeries2Ref
        var seriesSlave = candleSeriesRef
        
      }        

      if(param.time !== undefined) {

        //time axis
        var xx = chartToModify.current.timeScale().timeToCoordinate(param.time);
        var price = seriesMaster.current.coordinateToPrice(param.point.y)
        //price axis
        var yy = seriesSlave.current.priceToCoordinate(price);
        //console.log("x cord = " + xx)
        //console.log("y cord = " + yy)
        //everything is good, so update the crosshair
        if(xx !== null){
          //console.log("both axis")
          //console.log("x = " + xx)
          //console.log("y = " + yy)
          chartToModify.current.setCrossHairXY(xx,yy,true);
          //set previous because xx is a lefit time
          crosshairPreviousXX = xx
        }
        else{
          //console.log("else")
          //console.log("x = " + xx)
          //console.log("y = " + yy)
          //if xx is null than it did not respond with a time, so use crosshairPreviousXX so it displays something
          chartToModify.current.setCrossHairXY(crosshairPreviousXX,yy,true);
        }
      }
      
      //time is undefined
      else{
        //point.y exists
        if(param.point !== undefined){
          //console.log("param.point.y = " + param.point.y )
          var price = seriesMaster.current.coordinateToPrice(param.point.y)
          //price axis
          var yy = seriesSlave.current.priceToCoordinate(price); 
          //only show the price axis
          //console.log("x = " + xx)
          //console.log("y = " + yy)
          chartToModify.current.setCrossHairXY(null,yy,true); 
        }

        //no axis points exist, most likely cursor is in Y price scale axis
        //point.y does not exist
        else{
          //clar the slave chart crosshair
          chartToModify.current.clearCrossHair();
        }
      
      }
    }
    
    
    const chart1CrosshairSyncHandler = (param) => {
      crosshairSyncHandler(param, 1)
    }
    
    const chart2CrosshairSyncHandler = (param) => {
      crosshairSyncHandler(param, 2)
    }         

  
    //chart 2 exists and sync crosshairs is enabled
    if(chartReady === true && chart2Ready === true && syncCrosshairsDisabled === false && syncCrosshairsSelected === true){
      console.log("inside sync crosshairs")
  
      //chart 1 active
      if(pointerOverChart === 1){
        if(chart2.current !== null && chart2ContainerRef.current !== null){
          chart2.current.unsubscribeCrosshairMove(chart2CrosshairSyncHandler)
        }
        
        chart.current.subscribeCrosshairMove(chart1CrosshairSyncHandler)
      }

      //chart 2 active
      else if(pointerOverChart === 2){
        chart.current.unsubscribeCrosshairMove(chart1CrosshairSyncHandler)
        if(chart2.current !== null && chart2ContainerRef.current !== null){
          chart2.current.subscribeCrosshairMove(chart2CrosshairSyncHandler)
        }   
      }      

      return () => {
        chart.current.unsubscribeCrosshairMove(chart1CrosshairSyncHandler)
        if(chart2.current !== null && chart2ContainerRef.current !== null){
          chart2.current.unsubscribeCrosshairMove(chart2CrosshairSyncHandler)
        }
        
      }
    }

    //crosshair sync is not active, so unsubscribe to both events
    else{
      chart.current.unsubscribeCrosshairMove(chart1CrosshairSyncHandler)

      if(chart2Ready === true && chart2.current !== null && chart2ContainerRef.current !== null){
        chart2.current.unsubscribeCrosshairMove(chart2CrosshairSyncHandler)
      }
      
    }
  }

}, [chartReady, chart2Ready, syncCrosshairsDisabled, syncCrosshairsSelected, pointerOverChart])" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Make a ray using the built in createPriceLine code. This requires the timestamp number to be provided.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">manualLineToCreate</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">price</span>: #whateverPriceYouWant<span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">color</span>: <span class="pl-s">"yellow"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">lineWidth</span>: <span class="pl-c1">1</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">lineVisible</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">lineStyle</span>: <span class="pl-v">LineStyle</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">Solid</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">axisLabelVisible</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">title</span>: <span class="pl-s">"#AddYourTitle"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">draggable</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c">//draggale is not in this build, wont hurt anything to leave this in</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">ray</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c">//true to make the line a ray, needs rayStart if true.  If false then it will be a full horizontal line</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">rayStart</span>: #theTimeStampToHaveTheRayStart<span class="pl-kos">,</span>  <span class="pl-c">//required if ray: true, this is the timeStamp for the ray to start</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>

<span class="pl-c">//add the line</span>
<span class="pl-s1">manualLineToCreateFinal</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">candleSeriesRef</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">createPriceLine</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">manualLineToCreate</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

  }

//add the line
manualLineToCreateFinal = candleSeriesRef.current.createPriceLine(manualLineToCreate)" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><a name="user-content-how-to-use-line-tools"></a>How To Use LineTools</h2><a id="user-content-how-to-use-linetools" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How To Use LineTools" href="#how-to-use-linetools"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>read how to build the code <a href="#how-to-build">here</a></li>
<li>open the file "debug.html" in the root folder with browser or edit to view code for an example of each Line Tool</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Create a Line Tool</h3><a id="user-content-create-a-line-tool" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Create a Line Tool" href="#create-a-line-tool"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This will create a Horizontal LineTool.</p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><code>chart.current.addLineTool("HorizontalLine",[],{})</code></p>
</blockquote>
<p dir="auto">The empty array is the point(s), points can look like this</p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><code>[{price: #PRICE, timestamp: #TIMESTAMP}]</code></p>
</blockquote>
<p dir="auto">and the empty object at the end uses the default options.  It will create the line tool and wait for user input for a click to place it.  See "debug.html" to see all the options that are availible for each specific tool. Line Tool Options that exist but dont do anything are</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>angle, scale, cap, join</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Hold Shift on Some Line Tools</h3><a id="user-content-hold-shift-on-some-line-tools" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Hold Shift on Some Line Tools" href="#hold-shift-on-some-line-tools"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If you hold shift when editing a line tool will create a straight horizontal line while editing.  Shift works on only these specific line tools</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>ParallelChannel, TrendLine, Arrow, ExtendedLine, Ray, Rectangle, FibRetracement</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Line Tool Functionality</h3><a id="user-content-line-tool-functionality" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Line Tool Functionality" href="#line-tool-functionality"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<br>
exportLineTools() will export all existing line tools, it will be a JSON string
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><code>var allExistingLineTools = chart.current.exportLineTools()</code></p>
</blockquote>
<br>
import line tools JSON string and it will be added to the chart, it compounds on top of any existing line tools, even if id's have duplictes. You could "chart.current.removeAllLineTools()" to deleted everyting first before the import
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><code>chart.current.importLineTools(chart.current.exportLineTools())</code></p>
</blockquote>
<br>
deletes all line tools on the specific chart
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><code>chart.current.removeAllLineTools()</code></p>
</blockquote>
<br>
If you select a line tool on screen, then run this command, the selected line tool(s) will be deleted
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><code>chart.current.removeSelectedLineTools()</code></p>
</blockquote>
<br>
create a line tool object and apply it to an existing line by having the "id" match
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>  <span class="pl-k">var</span> <span class="pl-s1">applyLineToolOptionsOBJ</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>

      <span class="pl-c1">toolType</span>: <span class="pl-v">String</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span>#lineToolName<span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-c1">options</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>#optionsToChange<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-c1">points</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span>#pointsObject1<span class="pl-kos">,</span>#pointsObject2<span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
  <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">applyLineToolOptions</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">applyLineToolOptionsOBJ</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

      id: String(#idOfLineToolToModify),

      options: {#optionsToChange},
      points: [#pointsObject1,#pointsObject2],
  }
  chart.current.applyLineToolOptions(applyLineToolOptionsOBJ)" tabindex="0" role="button">

<br>
<p dir="auto">Get the currently selected line tool, and return that line tools data in the format that exportLineTools() uses</p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><code>var theSelectedLineTool = chart.current.getSelectedLineTools()</code></p>
</blockquote>
<br>
<p dir="auto">Delete any line tools that match these specific ID's.  It needs to be an array of string ID's</p>
<p dir="auto"><code>chart.current.removeLineToolsById(["id1","id2","id3","id4"])</code></p>
<br>
<p dir="auto">Sorry, I dont know how to use this one, I have not needed to use this</p>
<p dir="auto"><code>chart.current.setActiveLineTool("#IdontKNowWhatToPassToThis")</code></p>
<br>
<p dir="auto">When a line tool is double clicked, params will be the specific line tool's export data.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">function</span> <span class="pl-en">lineToolWasDoubleClicked</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">params</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>

<span class="pl-kos">}</span>

<span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">subscribeLineToolsDoubleClick</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">lineToolWasDoubleClicked</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unsubscribeLineToolsDoubleClick</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">lineToolWasDoubleClicked</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto">Subscribe to when a line tool is edited, or on creation.  Take note of the stage to tell if it was just created or if it was edited after it has already been created.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">function</span> <span class="pl-en">lineToolFinishedEditingChart</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">params</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-smi">console</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"LineToolFinishedEditing EVENT"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
  <span class="pl-smi">console</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">params</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
  
  <span class="pl-c">//params will be</span>
  <span class="pl-c">//{</span>
    <span class="pl-c">//selectedLineTool: #exportedLineToolData,</span>
    <span class="pl-c">//stage: string("#stageTheLineTool") </span>
  <span class="pl-c">//}</span>
  <span class="pl-c">//stage can be</span>
  <span class="pl-c">//  "lineToolEdited" this is after a line tool has ben edited after it has already been created</span>
  <span class="pl-c">//  "pathFinished" this is when the path line tool finished being created</span>
  <span class="pl-c">//  "lineToolFinished" this is when any line tool besides path just finished being created.</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-k">if</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">chartReady</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">subscribeLineToolsAfterEdit</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">lineToolFinishedEditingChart</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>


  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">chart</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">current</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unsubscribeLineToolsAfterEdit</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">lineToolFinishedEditingChart</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>  
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

  console.log("LineToolFinishedEditing EVENT")
  console.log(params)
  
  //params will be
  //{
    //selectedLineTool: #exportedLineToolData,
    //stage: string("#stageTheLineTool") 
  //}
  //stage can be
  //  "lineToolEdited" this is after a line tool has ben edited after it has already been created
  //  "pathFinished" this is when the path line tool finished being created
  //  "lineToolFinished" this is when any line tool besides path just finished being created.
}
if(chartReady === true){
  chart.current.subscribeLineToolsAfterEdit(lineToolFinishedEditingChart);


  return () => {
    chart.current.unsubscribeLineToolsAfterEdit(lineToolFinishedEditingChart);
  }  
}" tabindex="0" role="button">
